ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designation */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the designation belongs to */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the designation is a protected area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the domain belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the measure belongs to */,
  "is_key_indicator" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the measure is a key indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculation_methods" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation method */,
  "calculation_name" TEXT /* Name of the calculation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calculation method */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used for the calculation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scopes" (
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scope */,
  "scope_name" TEXT /* Name of the scope */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scope */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the scope belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scopes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the unit belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designation */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure */,
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calculation method */,
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scope */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_scope_id FOREIGN KEY ("scope_id") REFERENCES scopes ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_calculation_id FOREIGN KEY ("calculation_id") REFERENCES calculation_methods ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES designations ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
